name: The Impossible Show
flavor: The whole tent disappears. In its place: whatever you need everyone to believe is standing here instead - a burning building, a bottomless pit, an army that was never hired.
description: You spend nearly your entire banked Phantasm to remake reality itself, filling a 60-foot cube within range with a fully realised illusory environment - sight, sound, temperature, even scent, all convincingly wrong. You can make it appear as anything you can imagine: a collapsed tunnel, a roaring inferno, a cheering crowd of a hundred phantom performers, a chasm where the floor used to be. The illusion requires no concentration and persists for the duration even while you do other things. Objects and creatures placed by the trick have no substance and deal no damage on their own, but any creature that interacts with the illusion (touches it, walks into it, tries to use it as cover) can attempt to discern it is false with an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}; a creature that fails wholly believes what it perceives and acts accordingly (a creature that believes it sees a chasm won't walk into it; a creature that believes a wall of fire is real won't push through it) until it succeeds on a later check or physically passes through the illusion. Once during the duration, as a bonus action, you can make the entire illusion enact a single dramatic moment of your choice - the phantom army charges, the fire roars up, the floor gives way. Every creature that still believes the illusion and is positioned within it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} or become frightened of the source of the illusion and, if it has a reaction available, use it to flee or recoil from that source. This trick requires you to have at least 5 Phantasm banked, which are spent whether or not the illusion fools anyone.
sheetSummary: Once per combat. Action, 120 ft, up to a 60-ft cube, costs 5 Phantasm, up to 10 min, no concentration. Full-sense illusory environment; no inherent damage. Investigation check vs trick save DC to disbelieve on interaction; believers act as if it's real. Once per casting (bonus action): dramatic beat - believing creatures in the area make a Wisdom save vs trick save DC or become frightened and spend their reaction fleeing/recoiling.
